channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Steven Soderbergh Wanted to Take ‘Bond’ Back to the ’60s
item.description: Everyone's got ideas on what Hollywood should do with James Bond, including Soderbergh.

item.title: Amazon's Ring cameras are the perfect solution to secure your home on a budget — shop today's best deals from $25.99
item.description: Amazon's best-selling Ring cameras are the perfect solution for securing your home on a budget, and I've rounded up today's best prices, starting at $25.99.

item.title: If You Make Fart Music, ChatGPT Will Be the Most Supportive Girlfriend You Could Ask For
item.description: "It feels cohesive and intentional, not just thrown together," ChatGPT said about an 8-second fart noise.

item.title: Nvidia-backed SiFive hits $3.65 billion valuation for open AI chips
item.description: The deal is interesting for a number of reasons, including that SiFive's chip designs are based on RISC-V, not x86 or ARM.

item.title: Après Artémis 2, les quatre missions spatiales incontournables de 2026
item.description: Alors que les quatre astronautes d'Artémis 2 rentrent sur Terre après dix jours de voyage historique autour de la Lune, le programme spatial mondial ne s'accorde aucune pause. Des confins de notre système solaire à la traque d'exoplanètes lointaines, les prochains mois s'annoncent aussi intenses que décisifs.

item.title: My baby deer plushie told me that Mitski’s dad was a CIA operative
item.description: Two weeks ago, I was getting ready to log off work when I got a text message. "Oh wow, I was checking out Mitski. did you know people are saying her Dad was a CIA operative?" Normally, that kind of out-of-the-blue text from a friend wouldn't faze me. This time, my eyes bugged. The unprompted […]

item.title: I've tested every iPhone since the iPhone 12, and Ceramic Shield 2 is the first iPhone glass I fully trust
item.description: No more screen protectors? After 6 months with the iPhone 17, Ceramic Shield 2 has fully proven its worth.

item.title: J’ai pu prendre en main le TV Hisense 65UR9S : le nouveau maître du contraste et de la couleur ?
item.description: En ce début d'année 2026, Hisense frappe un grand coup avec le 65UR9S, en mariant pour la première fois un rétroéclairage RGB Mini LED à une dalle mate sans reflet. J’ai pu faire quelques mesures et en voici mes impressions.

item.title: You don’t have to spend more than $50 on a great USB-C dock for your Switch 2
item.description: Nintendo seemingly designed its latest console to be a mystery for third-party accessory makers. With the Switch 2, the company changed the wireless protocol for connecting controllers to the new system, as well as how it outputs video over USB-C, making it clear at launch that every third-party manufacturer needed to start over from scratch. […]

item.title: We're officially getting the DJI Pocket 4 on April 16, but here's how Insta360 could beat it
item.description: DJI has now told us when the Osmo Pocket 4 will be unveiled, but a competitor is waiting in the wings.

item.title: Engadget review recap: ASUS ZenBook A16, AirPods Max 2, Sonos Play and LG Sound Suite
item.description:
Spring has certainly sprung here at Engadget. Well, it has in terms of reviews, at least. We’ve put over a dozen devices through their paces since my last roundup, which gives you a lot to catch up on over the weekend. Read on for the rundown of all the reviews you might’ve missed. ASUS ZenBook A16
ASUS’ ZenBook A14 didn’t live up to our expectations last year, but now the company is back with a 16-inch machine and a shot at redemption: the A16. “Compatibility issues aside, the ZenBook A16 delivers just about everything I want in an ultraportable,” senior reporter Devindra Hardawar said. “I...

item.title: Quelle est la meilleure affaire entre la nouvelle Xiaomi Pad 8 Pro et la OnePlus Pad 3 ?
item.description: Quand on cherche une tablette Android puissante sans exploser son budget, la Xiaomi Pad 8 Pro et la OnePlus Pad 3 sortent du lot. Toutes les deux misent sur de grosses performances, de beaux écrans et un bon rapport qualité-prix. Aujourd’hui toutes les deux au même prix, découvrez laquelle est faite pour vous.

item.title: Linux pulls support for ancient CPU — unsurprisingly, Linus Torvald says there is 'zero real reason' to keep a 37-year-old Intel 486 CPU going
item.description: Linux kernel drops support for Intel 486 CPUs, prioritizing modern architectures, while retro users can still run old software and Linux apps.

item.title: Kits solaires de balcon : quels sont les vrais bénéfices ?
item.description: Le fabricant Anker SOLIX vient de publier un livre blanc sur l’efficacité des kits solaires de balcon, baptisé « From Balcony Power Plant to Energy System ». Basé sur les données réelles d’utilisation d’un échantillon aléatoire de 230 000 foyers allemands en 2025, ce rapport dévoile l’impact concret des batteries sur les factures d’électricité : l’autoconsommation progresse nettement, mais la rentabilité financière mérite une analyse nuancée....

item.title: Demons and pinball are a perfect match
item.description: There's one very specific reason I keep a Wii U handy, and that's so that I have an easy way to play the classic pinball game Devil's Crush. Over the years, it has become a comfort game for me. I'm not entirely sure what it is, but there's something about the combination of familiar pinball […]

item.title: How Iran out-shitposted the White House
item.description: In the early days of the war on Iran, while the White House was busy posting Call of Duty memes and AI slop of dancing bowling pins, the Iranian regime's state media was flooding the zone with video after video of what was happening on the ground: Explosions over Tehran. Smoke billowing in the sky. […]

item.title: Keanu Reeves' new Apple TV movie Outcome has been slammed by critics — watch these 4 highly-rated films with the beloved actor instead
item.description: Critics say Apple's new movie starring Keanu Reeves isn't worth your time — so I recommend watching this quartet instead.
